nodes.label: Tests for #1488 — composer voice buttons (dictation vs voice mode).  The compose
index.html composer markup for the dictation + voice-mode buttons.
btnMic must bind data-i18n-title="voice_dictate" so its tooltip         is disti
The static title/tooltip attributes must differ as a fallback for         users
btnVoiceMode SVG must use the audio-lines (waveform) shape.         We detect th
i18n.js must define the four new keys and remove the stale voice_toggle.
The old key whose string was 'Voice input' caused the duplicate-         tooltip
Every locale block must define all 4 new composer voice-button keys.
English voice_mode_toggle must read 'Voice mode' — matches         ChatGPT/Gemin
boot.js must hide btnVoiceMode by default, surface it via Preferences.
The pref reads from localStorage key 'hermes-voice-mode-button'.
Default state of btnVoiceMode display must be 'none'; visibility         gated b
index.html Preferences pane must include the toggle checkbox.
The two new pref-label i18n keys must exist in every locale.
panels.js must read the checkbox state, persist to localStorage,         and cal
When recording / in voice mode, tooltips should flip to the     'stop' variants
_deactivate() should set modeBtn.title back to voice_mode_toggle.
The audio-lines icon should be in LI_PATHS for any future reuse via li().
